244 G0300E_BAL_SRFC_TRNSFR_CD G0300E_BAL_SRFC_TRNSFR_CD G0300E Balance With Surface to Surface Transfer Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's balance while moving between surfaces (transfer between bed and chair or wheelchair). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Steady
